sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-05-29 17:44
- Distance: 7.6 km
- Moving time: 42:09
- Elapsed time: 42:51
- Elevation gain: 168.8 m
- Average heart rate: 164.5 bpm
- Max heart rate: 175 bpm
- Average watts: 214.2 W
- Average speed: 10.8 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `164.4 bpm`, ranging from `160.1` to `167.0 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `169.7 spm`, with a working range of `101.8` to `175.0 spm` after excluding `3` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `168.8 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `168.7 spm` (-0.1 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:33 /km` across `7.584 km` in `42:09` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:26 /km` and second-half pace was `5:41 /km` (+14 s/km), so pace eased a little late.

- Strava summary HR came in at `164.5 bpm` average and `175 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `161.4 bpm` in the first half and `166.9 bpm` in the second (+5.5 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `42:09` out of `42:51` elapsed (98.4%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `9` stop segments and `0.9%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `174.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `37.0 m` and `89.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `81.4 m` in the first half and `92.8 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
